title: A Decisive Matchup in the Onigashima Raid
description: On pages 15–18, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Usopp, Tama, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16 as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What's the Deal with These Dinosaur Types?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It sucks we can't use a Kibi Dango on him! Just 'cause he didn't eat a smile!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cat burglar and Long nose... you're straw hats!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you doing in a scary place like this!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I was so worried about you, Olin!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not good... it's Mama's "mothering mode!" she sometimes gets like this around kids under 10!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You vanished when we got to Udon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want to thank you for looking after me back when I had amnesia.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WOW! You got your memories back~?! that's wonderful~!~!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll never forget the flavor of the Oshiruko soup that poor Otsuru gave me in Okobore town.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's just that... Okobore town is gone now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone lied to protect the Samurai and keep the raid a secret.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The town was burnt to the ground because they said they ate all the stolen food...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Sorry, Olin, that's all there is.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The entire town is to be executed, burn everything!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, Kaido's underlings are responsible?! They did that to the town that showed me hospitality?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Leave us alone! We've already got enough on our plate!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Don't let those maggots get past you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Too late! It's curtains for you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: The pirate world may be cruel,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Big Mom must be back there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh! That was Mama! She's alive!! Thank goodness!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 55 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
